title: Tool Dependency Update
description: List of tools that need their dependencies specified using the depends_on field in ToolSpec

context.orderingFunction: order_tools_by_dependencies() in spec.rs uses topological sort

completedDependencies.reason: If both are in config, install nvm first so user can manage node versions
If both are in config, install pyenv first so user can manage python versions
If both are in config, install rbenv first so user can manage ruby versions
Docker TUI requires Docker daemon to be installed
Default driver uses Docker; install Docker first if both in config
If K8s cluster tools are in config, install them before kubectl

highPriority.reason: Docker TUI requires Docker daemon to be installed
Default driver uses Docker; should install Docker first if both in config
If K8s cluster tools are in config, install them before kubectl

mediumPriority.reason: Kotlin runs on JVM, Java should be available first
mediumPriority.notes: Blocked: java tool does not exist in Jarvy. If java tool is added in the future, this dependency should be implemented.

mediumPriority.reason: Scala runs on JVM, Java should be available first
mediumPriority.notes: Blocked: java tool does not exist in Jarvy. If java tool is added in the future, this dependency should be implemented.

mediumPriority.reason: Usually connects to remote MongoDB, no local dependency needed
Usually connects to remote PostgreSQL, standalone CLI tool
Usually connects to remote MySQL, standalone CLI tool

lowPriority.reason: Bun is an alternative to Node, no dependency on nvm/node
Deno is standalone, no dependency on node ecosystem
Go is self-contained, no version manager dependency
Rustup is the standard installer, self-contained
Elixir runs on BEAM VM, Erlang should be installed first
lowPriority.notes: Blocked: erlang tool does not exist in Jarvy. If erlang tool is added in the future, this dependency should be implemented.

versionManagers.note: Version managers themselves don't depend on other tools

implementationSteps.description: Add depends_on: &["minikube", "kind"] to kubectl tool (if both K8s tools present)
Review JVM-based tools (kotlin, scala) for java dependency
implementationSteps.notes: java tool does not exist in Jarvy
erlang tool does not exist in Jarvy

testingGuidance.unitTests: Tests exist in src/tools/spec.rs for dependency ordering
testingGuidance.integrationTest: Create jarvy.toml with node+nvm, verify nvm installs first
testingGuidance.manualTest: Run jarvy setup with tools that have dependencies and verify order
